title: avenula hackelii subsp. stenophylla
intro: Avenula hackelii subsp. stenophylla, also known as Avenula stenophylla, is a subspecies of the Avenula hackelii plant, which is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Avenula stenophylla include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing, as well as its potential to soothe digestive issues and improve respiratory function. Avenula stenophylla is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
